title: Embedded (iFrame) Work Forms Top Padding.
excerpt: Need to have better control over iFramed workforms. The current solution leaves an annoying top margin in the work form. I should be able to turn that off or it shouldn’t be there in the first place.

posts.author: DavidatWISE (David R Currie)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to have better control over iFramed workforms. The current solution leaves an annoying top margin in the work form. I should be able to turn that off or it shouldn’t be there in the first place.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DavidatWISE

Our monday app Easyform supports controlling the top margin and many other aspects of the form.

You can read about our Margin From Top setting here in our docs.

If you have any questions or want help setting up the form, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyappshq.com or schedule a Zoom call with us here.
